verdicts.corrected_value: Plain is a modern customer support / helpdesk platform for product teams, offering inboxes, knowledge bases, integrations, AI assistants and extensibility.
verdicts.reasoning: The homepage describes Plain as a support infrastructure that enables B2B teams to build anything, confirming the description provided.
The URL for the Help Center resulted in a FETCH_ERROR due to exceeding redirects, preventing confirmation of the claim regarding API auth methods.
